chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D- 1301 of 2021 ( Mst. Kiran Mirani & another vs. P.O Sindh and others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Present; Irshad Ali Shah, J Zulfiqar Ali Sangi, J For direction 1. For orders on CMA No.1021/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.1022/2024 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on CMA No.1023/2024 (Contempt Appln.) 13-03-2024 Mr. Shah Nawaz Waseer, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>>..<<<<<< 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred. 3. It is contended by learned counsel for the petitioners that the SHO PS ‘A’ Section Ghotki has failed to provide protection to the petitioners in terms of order dated 07.09.2021 of this Court, therefore, he is liable to be prosecuted for contempt proceedings. No particular instance is referred by the petitioners, which may suggest that the said SHO has failed to provide protection to them in terms of order of this Court, which may justify taking action against him for contempt proceedings; consequently, the listed application is dismissed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
